reference: It is quite unlikely to develop seizures thirty-five years after a head injury. You may be having some other lesion in the brain, which needs to be ruled out first before trying naturopathy. You need a detailed evaluation and a magnetic resonance imaging of the brain.
text: it is quite unlikely to develop seizures 35 years after a head injury. You may be having some other lesion in the brain, which needs to be ruled out first before trying naturopathy, a detailed evaluation, and a magnetic resonance imaging of the brain.
